title: lundellianthus kingii
intro: Lundellianthus kingii, also known as the Mexican gold poppy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and exhibit anti-inflammatory effects due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Lundellianthus kingii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
